name: io.qent.broxy/n8n
title: n8n
description: MCP server for n8n node documentation with optional n8n instance management tools.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode expected by desktop MCP clients.

environmentVariables.name: DISABLE_CONSOLE_OUTPUT
environmentVariables.description: Suppress non-protocol console output to avoid stdio parsing issues.

environmentVariables.name: N8N_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional n8n instance URL to enable workflow-management tools.

environmentVariables.name: N8N_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional n8n API key for authenticated management operations.
